  // regardless of tab visibility, backoff state, or ETag caching. This loop is
  // intentionally NOT gated on pollingPaused and NEVER cancelled by the
  // visibilitychange handler, so it keeps running while the tab is hidden.
  //
  // It does a minimal status GET for the active thread, deliberately WITHOUT
  // sending If-None-Match, so the server can't 304 it into silence. It does no
  // rendering — maybeNotifyApproval() owns the popup (browser notification +
  // in-page cue) and self-dedupes via notifiedApprovals, so this firing every
  // few seconds is safe and produces exactly one popup per waiting transition.
  async function watchForApproval() {
    if (!selectedThread) return;
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`${API}/pipeline/status/${selectedThread}`);
      if (!r.ok) return;
      const d = await r.json();
      // Keep local state fresh enough that a later render shows the right thing,
      // but do NOT touch ETag/backoff/signature state owned by the UI poller.
      if (activePipelines[selectedThread]) {
        activePipelines[selectedThread].status = d.status || activePipelines[selectedThread].status;
        activePipelines[selectedThread].phase = (d.phase != null) ? d.phase : activePipelines[selectedThread].phase;
      }
      if (d && WAITING_STATUSES.has(d.status)) {
        maybeNotifyApproval({ thread_id: selectedThread, status: d.status, phase: d.phase });
      } else if (d) {
        // Left the waiting state — clear this thread's flags so a future
        // waiting phase (even the same one after reject/regenerate) re-notifies.
        for (const k of [...notifiedApprovals]) {
          if (k.startsWith(selectedThread + ':')) notifiedApprovals.delete(k);
        }
        clearApprovalTitle();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      // Quiet — next tick retries. Never throws into the timer loop.
    }
  }

  function scheduleApprovalWatch(delayMs) {
    // NOTE: intentionally NOT guarded by pollingPaused — this is the whole point.
    if (approvalWatchTimer) clearTimeout(approvalWatchTimer);
    approvalWatchTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
      await watchForApproval();
      scheduleApprovalWatch(APPROVAL_WATCH_MS);
    }, delayMs);
  }

  // Backward-compat alias — anywhere old code calls pollAll(), redirect to pollActiveOnly
  async function pollAll() {
    await Promise.all([pollActiveOnly(), refreshSidebarList()]);
  }

  async function approvePipeline(threadId, approved) {
    const feedback = document.getElementById('feedback-' + threadId)?.value || '';

    try {
      const r = await fetch(`${API}/pipeline/approve/${threadId}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'X-API-Key': API_KEY
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ approved, feedback })
      });
      const d = await r.json();
      showToast(approved ? '✓ Approved — pipeline continuing' : '✗ Rejected', approved ? 'success' : 'error');
      // The pipeline just unblocked — snap polling back to fast cadence so the
      // user sees the next phase transition immediately. Also clear stale
      // ETags so the next poll definitely fetches fresh state (we KNOW the
      // server-side state just changed; trusting the cache would be wrong).
      pollIntervalMs = POLL_BASE_MS;
      pollUnchangedCount = 0;
      sidebarIntervalMs = SIDEBAR_BASE_MS;
      sidebarUnchangedCount = 0;
      lastPipelineStatusETag = null;
      lastPipelineListETag = null;
      setTimeout(() => {
        pollAll();
        scheduleActivePoll(pollIntervalMs);
        scheduleSidebarPoll(sidebarIntervalMs);
      }, 1000);
    } catch(e) {
      showToast('Approval failed: ' + e.message, 'error');
    }
  }

  // ── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  function renderSidebar() {
    const el = document.getElementById('pipeline-list');
    const threads = Object.keys(activePipelines);

    if (!threads.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-pipelines">No pipelines yet.<br>Launch one above.</div>';
      return;
    }

    el.innerHTML = threads.map(tid => {
      const p = activePipelines[tid];
      const isSelected = tid === selectedThread;
      const statusColor = p.status?.includes('WAITING') ? 'var(--warn)' :
              p.status === 'PIPELINE_COMPLETE' ? 'var(--accent)' :
                      p.status === 'ERROR' ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--blue)';
      return `
      <div class="pipeline-item ${isSelected ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="selectThread('${tid}')">
        <div class="pipeline-item-id">${tid}</div>
        <div class="pipeline-item-req">${p.requirement?.substring(0, 45)}...</div>
        <div class="pipeline-item-status" style="color:${statusColor}">${p.status || 'starting'}</div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  function renderPipelineBar() {
    if (!selectedThread) return;
    const p = activePipelines[selectedThread];
    if (!p) return;

    const phases = [
      { label: '01 Discovery', waitKey: 'WAITING_PHASE_1_APPROVAL', runKey: 'PHASE_1_RUNNING' },
      { label: '02 Planning', waitKey: 'WAITING_PHASE_2_APPROVAL', runKey: 'PHASE_2_RUNNING' },
      { label: '03 Impact', waitKey: 'WAITING_PHASE_3_APPROVAL', runKey: 'PHASE_3_RUNNING' },
      { label: '04 Codegen', runKey: 'PHASE_4_RUNNING' },
      { label: '05 Validate', runKey: 'PHASE_5_RUNNING' },
      { label: '06 Delivery', waitKey: 'WAITING_PHASE_6_APPROVAL', runKey: 'PHASE_6_RUNNING' },
      { label: '07 Deploy', waitKey: 'WAITING_PHASE_7_APPROVAL', runKey: 'PHASE_7_RUNNING' },
    ];

    const status = p.status || '';
    const phaseNum = p.phase || 1;

    document.getElementById('pipeline-bar').innerHTML = phases.map((ph, i) => {
      const num = i + 1;
      let cls = '';
      let dot = '○';

      if (status === ph.runKey) { cls = 'active'; dot = '●'; }
      else if (status === ph.waitKey) { cls = 'waiting'; dot = '⏸'; }
      else if (num < phaseNum || status === 'PIPELINE_COMPLETE') { cls = 'done'; dot = '✓'; }
      else if (status === 'ERROR') { cls = 'error'; dot = '✗'; }

      return `<div class="phase-chip ${cls}"><span class="phase-dot"></span>${ph.label}</div>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  function renderContent() {
    const el = document.getElementById('content');

    if (!selectedThread) {
      el.innerHTML = `
      <div class="empty-state">
        <div class="empty-icon">🚀</div>
        <div class="empty-title">Launch a Pipeline</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">Enter a requirement above and click Launch</div>
      </div>`;
      return;
    }

    const p = activePipelines[selectedThread];
    if (!p) return;

    const status = p.status || '';
    const state = p.current_state || {};
    const isWaiting = status.includes('WAITING');
    const isRunning = status.includes('RUNNING');
    const isComplete = status === 'PIPELINE_COMPLETE';
    const isError = status === 'ERROR';

    let html = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start">
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800">Pipeline Status</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">${selectedThread}</div>
      </div>
      <a href="${API}/pipeline/${selectedThread}/download/all" target="_blank"
         style="background:var(--accent);color:#090c10;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">
        ⬇ Download Full Package
      </a>
    </div>`;

    // Status banner
    const bannerColor = isWaiting ? 'var(--warn)' : isComplete ? 'var(--accent)' :
            isError ? 'var(--danger)' : 'var(--blue)';
    const bannerIcon = isWaiting ? '⏸' : isComplete ? '✅' : isError ? '❌' : '⚙';

    html += `
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid ${bannerColor}33;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:20px">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
        <span style="font-size:20px">${bannerIcon}</span>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:${bannerColor}">${status}</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">${p.requirement?.substring(0,80)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

    // ── Phase 0 routing panel ──────────────────────────────────────
    if (state.selected_project) {
      const proj = state.selected_project;
      const isNew = state.is_new_project;
      const repos = (state.selected_repos || []).map(r =>
              `<code style="background:var(--surface2);color:var(--blue);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px">${r.name}</code>`
      ).join(' ');
      html += `
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:16px">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px">
          00 — Project Routing
          <span style="margin-left:8px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;
            background:${isNew ? 'rgba(0,212,255,0.15)' : 'rgba(16,185,129,0.15)'};
            color:${isNew ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--accent)'}">
            ${isNew ? '🆕 NEW PROJECT' : '✓ MATCHED'}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)">${proj.name}</div>
        <div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px">${repos}</div>
      </div>`;
    }

    // ── PHASE 1 — BRD/PRD/ADR/Architecture ──────────────────────
    if (state.brd?.title || state.prd || state.adr || state.architecture) {
      const needsApproval = status === 'WAITING_PHASE_1_APPROVAL';

      // Show sub-stage progress if still running
      const subStage = p.sub_stage || '';
      const brdDone = !!state.brd?.title;
      const prdDone = !!(state.prd?.functional_requirements?.length);
      const adrDone = !!(state.adr?.decisions?.length);
      const archDone = !!(state.architecture?.nodes?.length);

      html += sectionHeader('01', 'Discovery — BRD / PRD / ADR / Architecture', needsApproval);

      // Progress indicator while running
      if (status.includes('PHASE_1') && !needsApproval) {
        html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        ${[
          ['📋 BRD', brdDone],
          ['📄 PRD', prdDone],
          ['🏛 ADR', adrDone],
          ['🏗 Architecture', archDone]
        ].map(([label, done]) => `
          <div style="padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;border:1px solid ${done ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--border)'};color:${done ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text3)'};background:${done ? 'rgba(0,255,136,0.05)' : 'transparent'}">
            ${done ? '✓' : '○'} ${label}
          </div>`).join('')}
        ${subStage ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--warn);padding:4px 0"><span class="spinner" style="width:10px;height:10px;margin-right:6px"></span>${subStage}</div>` : ''}
      </div>`;
      }

      // BRD
      if (state.brd?.title) {
        html += subHeaderWithDownload('📋 Business Requirements (BRD)', 'brd');
        html += dataRow('Title', state.brd.title);

        if (state.brd.executive_summary)
          html += dataRow('Executive Summary', state.brd.executive_summary);

        if (state.brd.business_context)
          html += dataRow('Business Context', state.brd.business_context);

        if (state.brd.business_objectives?.length)
          html += dataRow('Business Objectives', state.brd.business_objectives.map(o=>`• ${o}`).join('<br>'));

        if (state.brd.in_scope?.length)
          html += dataRow('In Scope', state.brd.in_scope.map(s=>`• ${s}`).join('<br>'));

        if (state.brd.out_of_scope?.length)
          html += dataRow('Out of Scope', state.brd.out_of_scope.map(s=>`• ${s}`).join('<br>'));

        // Stakeholders — handle object structure
        if (state.brd.stakeholders?.length) {
          html += dataRow('Stakeholders', state.brd.stakeholders.map(s => {
            if (typeof s === 'string') return `• ${s}`;
            const role = s.role || '';
            const name = s.name_or_team || s.name || '';
            const resp = s.responsibility || '';
            return `• <strong style="color:var(--accent)">${role}</strong>${name ? ` <span style="color:var(--text2)">(${name})</span>` : ''}${resp ? `<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;${resp}` : ''}`;
          }).join('<br>'));
        }

        // RACI Matrix as a table
        if (state.brd.raci_matrix?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">RACI Matrix</div>`;
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:8px">
          <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px">
            <thead>
              <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:700">Activity</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--accent)">R</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--blue)">A</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--warn)">C</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">I</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              ${state.brd.raci_matrix.map(r => `
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text)">${r.activity || ''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.responsible || ''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.accountable || ''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.consulted || ''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.informed || ''}</td>
                </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>`;
        }

        // Functional Requirements as cards
        if (state.brd.functional_requirements?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          Functional Requirements (${state.brd.functional_requirements.length})
        </div>`;
          state.brd.functional_requirements.forEach(fr => {
            const pColor = fr.priority === 'Critical' || fr.priority === 'High' ? 'var(--danger)' : fr.priority === 'Medium' ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--accent)';
            html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid ${pColor}">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px">
              <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${fr.id||''}</span>
              <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${fr.title||''}</span>
              <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;color:${pColor}">${fr.priority||''}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px">${fr.description||''}</div>
            ${fr.business_value ? `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:4px"><strong>Business Value:</strong> ${fr.business_value}</div>` : ''}
          </div>`;
          });
        }

        // Non-Functional Requirements as table
        if (state.brd.non_functional_requirements?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          Non-Functional Requirements (${state.brd.non_functional_requirements.length})
        </div>`;
          state.brd.non_functional_requirements.forEach(nfr => {
            html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid var(--blue)">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px">
              <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${nfr.id||''}</span>
              <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${nfr.title||''}</span>
              <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;color:var(--text3)">${nfr.priority||''}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${nfr.description||''}</div>
            ${nfr.metric ? `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:4px"><strong>Metric:</strong> ${nfr.metric}</div>` : ''}
          </div>`;
          });
        }

        // KPIs as table
        if (state.brd.kpis?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          Key Performance Indicators
        </div>`;
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:8px">
          <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px">
            <thead>
              <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">KPI</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--accent)">Target</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">Method</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">Frequency</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              ${state.brd.kpis.map(k => `
                <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text);font-weight:700">${k.name||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--accent)">${k.target||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${k.measurement_method||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${k.frequency||''}</td>
                </tr>`).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>`;
        }

        // Risk Matrix as table
        if (state.brd.risk_matrix?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--danger);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          ⚠️ Risk Matrix (${state.brd.risk_matrix.length})
        </div>`;
          html += `<div style="background:rgba(255,71,87,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,71,87,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:8px">
          <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px">
            <thead>
              <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">ID</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">Risk</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">L</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">I</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">Mitigation</th>
                <th style="text-align:left;padding:6px;color:var(--text3)">Owner</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              ${state.brd.risk_matrix.map(r => {
            const lColor = r.likelihood === 'High' ? 'var(--danger)' : r.likelihood === 'Medium' ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--accent)';
            const iColor = r.impact === 'High' ? 'var(--danger)' : r.impact === 'Medium' ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--accent)';
            return `<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${r.id||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text)">${r.risk||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:${lColor};font-weight:700">${r.likelihood||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:${iColor};font-weight:700">${r.impact||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.mitigation||''}</td>
                  <td style="padding:6px;color:var(--text2)">${r.owner||''}</td>
                </tr>`;
          }).join('')}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>`;
        }

        // Simple risks list (legacy fallback if risk_matrix not present)
        if (!state.brd.risk_matrix?.length && state.brd.risks?.length) {
          html += dataRow('Risks', state.brd.risks.map(r=>`• ${r}`).join('<br>'), 'warn');
        }

        // Assumptions
        if (state.brd.assumptions?.length)
          html += dataRow('Assumptions', state.brd.assumptions.map(a=>`• ${a}`).join('<br>'));

        // Dependencies
        if (state.brd.dependencies?.length)
          html += dataRow('Dependencies', state.brd.dependencies.map(d=>`• ${d}`).join('<br>'));

        // Success Criteria
        if (state.brd.success_criteria?.length)
          html += dataRow('Success Criteria', state.brd.success_criteria.map(s=>`• ${s}`).join('<br>'), 'accent');

        // Timeline & Budget
        if (state.brd.timeline_estimate)
          html += dataRow('Timeline', state.brd.timeline_estimate);
        if (state.brd.budget_considerations)
          html += dataRow('Budget Considerations', state.brd.budget_considerations);
      }

      // PRD
      if (state.prd?.title || state.prd?.product_vision || state.prd?.functional_requirements?.length) {
        html += subHeaderWithDownload('📄 Product Requirements (PRD)', 'prd');
        if (state.prd.product_vision || state.prd.productVision) {
          html += dataRow('Product Vision', state.prd.product_vision || state.prd.productVision || '');
        }

        const frs = state.prd.functional_requirements || state.prd.functionalRequirements || [];
        if (frs.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px">
          Functional Requirements (${frs.length})
        </div>`;
          frs.forEach(r => {
            html += reqCard(r.id, r.title, r.description, r.priority, r.acceptance_criteria || r.acceptanceCriteria || []);
          });
        }

        const nfrs = state.prd.non_functional_requirements || state.prd.nonFunctionalRequirements || state.prd.nfr || [];
        if (nfrs.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          Non-Functional Requirements (${nfrs.length})
        </div>`;
          nfrs.forEach(r => {
            html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid var(--blue)">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px">
              <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${r.id||''}</span>
              <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${r.title||r.name||''}</span>
              <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;color:var(--text3)">${r.priority||''}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${r.description||''}</div>
          </div>`;
          });
        }

        const trs = state.prd.technical_requirements || state.prd.technicalRequirements || [];
        if (trs.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:14px 0 6px">
          Technical Requirements (${trs.length})
        </div>`;
          trs.forEach(r => {
            html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid var(--warn)">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px">
              <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--warn);font-weight:700">${r.id||''}</span>
              <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${r.title||r.name||''}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${r.description||''}</div>
          </div>`;
          });
        }
      }

      // ADR
      if (state.adr?.decisions?.length) {
        html += subHeaderWithDownload('🏛 Architecture Decisions (ADR)', 'adr');
        state.adr.decisions.forEach(d => {
          html += adrCard(d.id, d.title, d.decision, d.consequences || []);
        });
      }

      // Architecture
      if (state.architecture?.nodes?.length) {
        html += subHeaderWithDownload('🏗 Architecture Design', 'architecture');
        const arch = state.architecture;

        // Stats row
        html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px">
        ${[
          ['System', arch.system_name || 'Untitled'],
          ['Style', arch.architecture_style || '—'],
          ['Deployment', arch.deployment_model || '—'],
          ['Components', arch.nodes?.length || 0]
        ].map(([l,v]) => `
          <div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
            <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">${l}</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)">${v}</div>
          </div>`).join('')}
      </div>`;

        if (arch.mermaid) {
          // Base64-encode the mermaid source so HTML parsing doesn't mangle quotes/newlines
          const encoded = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(arch.mermaid)));
          // Use the encoded string as a stable key so we know whether it changed
          const cacheKey = 'mer-' + encoded.slice(0, 32);
          const cached = mermaidCache[encoded];

          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow-x:auto">
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px">Architecture Diagram</div>
    <div class="mermaid-container" data-mermaid="${encoded}" data-cache-key="${cacheKey}">
      ${cached || '<div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;padding:20px;text-align:center"><span class="spinner" style="display:inline-block;margin-right:6px"></span>Rendering diagram...</div>'}
    </div>
  </div>`;
        }

        // Component cards
        html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px">Components</div>`;
        arch.nodes.forEach(n => {
          const typeColor = n.type==='database'?'var(--accent)':n.type==='external'?'#9b59b6':n.type==='queue'?'var(--warn)':'var(--blue)';
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid ${typeColor}">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px">
            <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--surface3);color:${typeColor}">${n.id}</span>
            <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700">${n.name}</span>
            <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);padding:2px 6px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px">${n.type} · ${n.zone}</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px">${n.description||''}</div>
          ${n.tech_stack?.length ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:4px">
            ${n.tech_stack.map(t=>`<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;background:rgba(0,153,255,0.1);border-radius:3px;color:var(--blue)">${t}</span>`).join('')}
          </div>` : ''}
          ${n.responsibilities?.length ? `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px">
            ${n.responsibilities.map(r=>`<div style="margin-bottom:2px">▸ ${r}</div>`).join('')}
          </div>` : ''}
        </div>`;
        });

        if (arch.security_considerations?.length) {
          html += `<div style="background:rgba(255,71,87,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,71,87,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px;margin-top:8px">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--danger);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px">🔒 Security Considerations</div>
          ${arch.security_considerations.map(s=>`<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px">• ${s}</div>`).join('')}
        </div>`;
        }
      }
      if (needsApproval) html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
      html += sectionClose();
    }
    // ── PHASE 2 — Sprint Plan / Jira / Runbook ──────────────────
    if (state.sprint_plan || state.runbook) {
      const needsApproval = status === 'WAITING_PHASE_2_APPROVAL';
      const epics = state.sprint_plan?.epics || [];
      const tickets = state.jira_tickets || [];
      html += sectionHeader('02', 'Planning — Sprint + Runbook', needsApproval);

      if (tickets.length) {
        const jiraBase = 'https://wissen-team-tqg48t7b.atlassian.net/browse';
        html += subHeaderWithDownload(`🎫 Jira Tickets (${tickets.length})`, 'sprint-plan');
        html += `<div class="ticket-list">
        ${tickets.map(t => `
          <a href="${jiraBase}/${t}" target="_blank"
             style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--surface3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--blue);text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">
            🔗 ${t}
          </a>`).join('')}
      </div><br>`;
      }

      if (epics.length) {
        html += subHeader(`📋 Sprint Plan — ${epics.length} Epics`);
        epics.forEach(epic => { html += epicCard(epic); });
      }

      if (state.runbook) {
        html += subHeaderWithDownload('🚀 Deployment Runbook', 'runbook', 'xlsx');
        const rb = state.runbook;
        if (rb.feature) html += dataRow('Feature', rb.feature);

        if (rb.deployment_sequence?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px">Deployment Steps</div>`;
          rb.deployment_sequence.forEach(s => {
            html += runbookStep(s);
          });
        }

        if (rb.rollback_steps?.length) {
          html += dataRow('Rollback Steps', rb.rollback_steps.map(s=>`• ${s}`).join('<br>'), 'warn');
        }

        if (rb.feature_flags?.length) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 6px">Feature Flags</div>`;
          rb.feature_flags.forEach(f => {
            html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:10px">
            <code style="color:var(--blue)">${f.flag_name}</code>
            <span style="color:var(--text3);margin-left:8px">default: ${f.default}</span>
            <span style="color:var(--accent);margin-left:8px">enable_after_deploy: ${f.enable_after_deploy}</span>
          </div>`;
          });
        }
      }

      if (needsApproval) html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
      html += sectionClose();
    }

    // ── PHASE 3 — Impact ────────────────────────────────────────
    if (state.impact_report?.affected_files) {
      const needsApproval = status === 'WAITING_PHASE_3_APPROVAL';
      const risk = state.impact_report.risk_assessment?.risk_level || '';
      const riskColor = risk === 'high' ? 'var(--danger)' : risk === 'medium' ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--accent)';

      html += sectionHeader('03', 'Impact Analysis', needsApproval);
      html += subHeaderWithDownload('Risk Assessment', 'impact');
      html += dataRow('Risk Level', `<span style="color:${riskColor};font-weight:700;font-size:14px">${risk.toUpperCase()}</span>`);
      html += dataRow('Recommendation', state.impact_report.risk_assessment?.recommendation || '');

      if (state.impact_report.risk_assessment?.breaking_changes?.length) {
        html += dataRow('Breaking Changes',
                state.impact_report.risk_assessment.breaking_changes.map(r=>`• ${r}`).join('<br>'), 'danger');
      }

      if (state.impact_report.affected_files?.length) {
        html += subHeader(`Affected Files (${state.impact_report.affected_files.length})`);
        state.impact_report.affected_files.forEach(f => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:4px">${f.file_path}</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3)">Repo: ${f.repo_name} | Score: ${f.relevance_score}</div>
        </div>`;
        });
      }

      if (needsApproval) html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
      html += sectionClose();
    }

    // ── PHASE 4+5 — Code + Tests ────────────────────────────────
    // Show this block when phase is 4 or 5, OR when artifacts exist
    const showPhase45 = (p.phase >= 4 && p.phase <= 5) || state.generated_changes?.length || state.test_files?.length;
    if (showPhase45) {
      html += sectionHeader('04+05', 'Code Generation + Validation', false);

      // LIVE sub-stage indicator while running
      if ((p.phase === 4 || p.phase === 5) && isRunning) {
        html += `<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,212,255,0.08),rgba(0,255,136,0.05));border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <div class="spinner"></div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Phase ${p.phase} · Live</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;margin-top:2px">${p.sub_stage || 'Working...'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      }

      // Status pills showing what's done
      html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px">
      <span style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:${state.generated_changes?.length ? 'rgba(0,255,136,0.15)' : 'var(--surface2)'};color:${state.generated_changes?.length ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text3)'}">
        ${state.generated_changes?.length ? '✓' : '○'} Code: ${state.generated_changes?.length || 0} files
      </span>
      <span style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;background:${state.test_files?.length ? 'rgba(0,255,136,0.15)' : 'var(--surface2)'};color:${state.test_files?.length ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text3)'}">
        ${state.test_files?.length ? '✓' : '○'} Tests: ${state.test_files?.length || 0} files
      </span>
    </div>`;

      if (state.generated_changes?.length) {
        html += subHeader(`Generated Code (${state.generated_changes.length} files)`);
        state.generated_changes.forEach(change => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${change.file_path}</div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent)">✓ validated</div>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px">${change.change_summary || ''}</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">
            ${(change.new_symbols_added||[]).map(s => `<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;background:rgba(0,255,136,0.1);border-radius:3px;color:var(--accent)">+ ${s}</span>`).join('')}
            ${(change.existing_symbols_modified||[]).map(s => `<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;background:rgba(0,153,255,0.1);border-radius:3px;color:var(--blue)">~ ${s}</span>`).join('')}
          </div>
          <details style="margin-top:10px">
            <summary style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer">View generated code</summary>
            <pre style="font-size:9px;background:var(--surface3);padding:10px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:6px;overflow-x:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;color:var(--text2);max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto">${esc(change.content||'')}</pre>
          </details>
        </div>`;
        });
      }

      if (state.test_files?.length) {
        html += `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin:14px 0 8px">
        <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3)">🧪 Generated Tests (${state.test_files.length})</div>
        <a href="${API}/pipeline/${selectedThread}/download/test-cases" target="_blank"
           style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:4px">
          ⬇ Test Cases XLSX
        </a>
      </div>`;
        state.test_files.forEach(tf => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px">
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${tf.test_file_path||''}</div>
            <span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;background:rgba(0,255,136,0.1);border-radius:3px;color:var(--accent)">${tf.test_count||0} tests</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px">Covers: ${(tf.tests_cover||[]).join(', ')}</div>
          <details>
            <summary style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer">View test code</summary>
            <pre style="font-size:9px;background:var(--surface3);padding:10px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:6px;overflow-x:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;color:var(--text2);max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto">${esc(tf.content||'')}</pre>
          </details>
        </div>`;
        });
      }

      html += sectionClose();
    }

    // ── PHASE 6 — Delivery ──────────────────────────────────────
    // Render when phase is 6, when PRs exist, or when waiting for approval
    const showPhase6 = p.phase === 6 || p.pr_urls?.length || state.pr_urls?.length || state.target_repo;
    if (showPhase6) {
      const needsApproval = status === 'WAITING_PHASE_6_APPROVAL';
      const urls = p.pr_urls?.length ? p.pr_urls : (state.pr_urls || []);
      html += sectionHeader('06', 'Delivery — GitHub PR', needsApproval);

      // LIVE sub-stage indicator
      if (p.phase === 6 && isRunning) {
        html += `<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,212,255,0.08),rgba(0,255,136,0.05));border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <div class="spinner"></div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Phase 6 · Live</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;margin-top:2px">${p.sub_stage || 'Working...'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      }

      // Show target repo prominently
      if (state.target_repo) {
        const isNew = state.is_new_project;
        html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-left:3px solid ${isNew ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--blue)'};border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:12px">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">Target Repository</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
          <code style="font-size:12px;color:${isNew ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--blue)'};font-weight:700">${state.target_repo}</code>
          ${isNew ? '<span style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(0,255,136,0.15);color:var(--accent);border-radius:10px">🆕 CREATED</span>' : ''}
          <a href="https://github.com/AkashW45/${state.target_repo}" target="_blank" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);text-decoration:none">↗ View on GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      }

      if (urls.length) {
        html += subHeader('Pull Requests');
        urls.forEach(url => {
          html += `<a class="pr-link" href="${url}" target="_blank">🔗 ${url}</a><br>`;
        });
      } else if (p.phase === 6 && !isRunning) {
        html += `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;padding:8px">No PR created yet</div>`;
      }

      if (needsApproval) html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
      html += sectionClose();
    }

    // ── PHASE 7 — Deployment ────────────────────────────────────
    const showPhase7 = p.phase === 7 || status.includes('PHASE_7') || status === 'DEPLOYMENT_COMPLETE' || status === 'WAITING_PHASE_7_APPROVAL';
    if (showPhase7) {
      const needsApproval = status === 'WAITING_PHASE_7_APPROVAL';
      html += sectionHeader('07', 'Deployment', needsApproval);

      // LIVE sub-stage indicator
      if (p.phase === 7 && isRunning) {
        html += `<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,212,255,0.08),rgba(0,255,136,0.05));border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:8px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <div class="spinner"></div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase">Phase 7 · Live</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;margin-top:2px">${p.sub_stage || 'Working...'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      }

      if (state.deploy_sequence?.length) {
        html += subHeader('Deploy Sequence');
        state.deploy_sequence.forEach(s => {
          html += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:4px">
          <span style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;font-size:11px">${s.step}</span>
          <span style="font-size:11px">${s.repo}</span>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-left:auto">${s.type}</span>
        </div>`;
        });
      }

      if (state.feature_flags?.length) {
        html += subHeader('Feature Flags');
        state.feature_flags.forEach(f => {
          html += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:4px">
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--blue)">${f.flag_name}</span>
          <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:${f.enabled ? 'rgba(0,255,136,0.1)' : 'rgba(72,79,88,0.3)'};color:${f.enabled ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--text3)'}">${f.enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}</span>
        </div>`;
        });
      }

      if (needsApproval) html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
      html += sectionClose();
    }

    // ── Approval fallback (status-driven, not data-driven) ──────────────────
    // Each phase block above renders its approve/reject zone ONLY when that
    // phase's artifact data is present (e.g. `state.sprint_plan`). If a pipeline
    // pauses in a WAITING_* status but its artifact data is missing, empty, or
    // not yet in current_state, none of those blocks render — leaving a paused
    // pipeline the user CANNOT act on. That was the bug: "paused for approval,
    // but no approve/reject shown." Approval is fundamentally a function of
    // STATUS, not of whether artifacts happened to render — so if we're waiting
    // and no approval zone was emitted above, emit one now.
    if (isWaiting && !html.includes('Human Review Required')) {
      html += approvalZone(selectedThread);
    }

    el.innerHTML = html;

    // Render Mermaid diagrams that aren't cached yet
    setTimeout(async () => {
      const nodes = el.querySelectorAll('.mermaid-container');
      for (const node of nodes) {
        // Skip if this node already contains an SVG (cached or already rendered)
        if (node.querySelector('svg')) continue;

        const encoded = node.getAttribute('data-mermaid');
        if (!encoded) continue;

        // Check cache first
        if (mermaidCache[encoded]) {
          node.innerHTML = mermaidCache[encoded];
          continue;
        }

        let rawCode;
        try {
          rawCode = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(encoded)));
        } catch (e) {
          node.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--danger);font-size:10px;padding:10px">Failed to decode mermaid source</div>`;
          continue;
        }

        // Ensure newlines — backend should send these but defensive
        if (!rawCode.includes('\n') && rawCode.length > 30) {
          // Try to split a one-line graph TD into separate statements
          rawCode = rawCode
                  .replace(/^graph\s+(TD|LR|BT|RL)\s+/, 'graph $1\n  ')
                  .replace(/\s+(classDef\s)/g, '\n  $1')
                  .replace(/\s+(class\s+[A-Z_0-9]+\s+\w+Style)/g, '\n  $1')
                  .replace(/(\]|\))\s+([A-Z_][A-Z_0-9]*\s*(\[|\(|--))/g, '$1\n  $2');
        }

        try {
          const id = 'mermaid-svg-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000);
          const { svg } = await mermaid.render(id, rawCode);
          mermaidCache[encoded] = svg;
          node.innerHTML = svg;
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn('Mermaid render error:', err, '\nSource:\n', rawCode);
          const errHtml = `<details style="font-size:10px"><summary style="color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;padding:8px">Diagram render failed — click to see source</summary><pre style="color:var(--text2);background:var(--surface3);padding:10px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:6px;white-space:pre-wrap;font-size:10px">${esc(rawCode)}</pre></details>`;
          mermaidCache[encoded] = errHtml;
          node.innerHTML = errHtml;
        }
      }
    }, 50);
  }
  // ── UI Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  function sectionHeader(num, title, needsApproval) {
    return `
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid ${needsApproval ? 'rgba(240,165,0,0.4)' : 'var(--border)'};border-radius:8px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <div style="background:var(--surface3);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:700">${num}</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700">${title}</div>
        </div>
        <span style="font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:3px;font-weight:700;background:${needsApproval ? 'rgba(240,165,0,0.15)' : 'rgba(0,255,136,0.1)'};color:${needsApproval ? 'var(--warn)' : 'var(--accent)'}">
          ${needsApproval ? '⏸ AWAITING APPROVAL' : '✓ DONE'}
        </span>
      </div>`;
  }

  function sectionClose() { return `</div>`; }

  function subHeader(title) {
    return `<div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin:14px 0 8px">${title}</div>`;
  }

  function subHeaderWithDownload(title, key, ext='md') {
    return `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin:14px 0 8px">
    <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3)">${title}</div>
    <a href="${API}/pipeline/${selectedThread}/download/${key}" target="_blank"
       style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:4px">
      ⬇ ${ext.toUpperCase()}
    </a>
  </div>`;
  }

  function dataRow(label, value, colorClass='') {
    const color = colorClass==='warn'?'var(--warn)':colorClass==='danger'?'var(--danger)':colorClass==='accent'?'var(--accent)':'var(--text)';
    return `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px">
    <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">${label}</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:${color};line-height:1.6">${value}</div>
  </div>`;
  }

  function reqCard(id, title, desc, priority, ac) {
    const pColor = priority==='High'||priority==='Critical'?'var(--danger)':priority==='Medium'?'var(--warn)':'var(--accent)';
    return `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid ${pColor}">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px">
      <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700">${id||''}</span>
      <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${title||''}</span>
      <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;color:${pColor}">${priority||''}</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px">${desc||''}</div>
    ${ac.length ? `<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3)"><strong>AC:</strong> ${ac.map(a=>`• ${a}`).join(' ')}</div>` : ''}
  </div>`;
  }

  function adrCard(id, title, decision, consequences) {
    return `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px">
      <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--blue)">${id||''}</span>
      <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${title||''}</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:6px">${decision||''}</div>
    ${consequences.length?`<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3)">${consequences.map(c=>`• ${c}`).join('<br>')}</div>`:''}
  </div>`;
  }

  function epicCard(epic) {
    return `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:4px">📋 ${epic.title||''}</div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px">${epic.description||''}</div>
    ${(epic.stories||[]).map(s=>`<div style="background:var(--surface3);border-radius:4px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;margin-left:12px">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px">📌 ${s.title||''} <span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:8px">(${s.story_points||'?'} pts)</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2)">${s.description||''}</div>
      ${s.acceptance_criteria?.length?`<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px"><strong>AC:</strong> ${s.acceptance_criteria.map(a=>`• ${a}`).join(' ')}</div>`:''}
    </div>`).join('')}
  </div>`;
  }

  function runbookStep(step) {
    return `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start">
    <span style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;font-size:13px;min-width:20px">${step.step}</span>
    <div style="flex:1">
      <div style="font-size:11px;margin-bottom:3px">${step.repo||''} — ${step.action||''}</div>
      ${step.command?`<code style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);background:var(--surface3);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;display:inline-block">${step.command}</code>`:''}
    </div>
  </div>`;
  }

  // Fire an approval notification exactly once per transition into a waiting
  // state. Because the transition can occur while the tab is hidden (polling
  // paused), this is also called from the resume poll — the notifiedApprovals
  // guard ensures the user still gets exactly one popup when they return,
  // rather than zero (the old bug) or one-per-poll (spam).
  function maybeNotifyApproval(p) {
    if (!p || !WAITING_STATUSES.has(p.status)) return;
    const key = p.thread_id + ':' + p.status;
    if (notifiedApprovals.has(key)) return;   // already notified for this transition
    notifiedApprovals.add(key);

    const phaseLabel = (p.phase != null) ? ('Phase ' + p.phase) : 'A phase';
    const msg = phaseLabel + ' is awaiting your approval.';

    // Browser notification (works even when this tab isn't focused) IF the user
    // previously granted permission. We never auto-request it on load; see the
    // one-time opt-in wired from the approval UI. Guarded so it never throws.
    try {
      if (window.Notification && Notification.permission === 'granted') {
        new Notification('SDLC-V2 — approval needed', { body: msg });
      }
    } catch (e) { /* notifications unavailable; fall through to in-page cue */ }

    // Reliable in-page fallback — always runs, no permission needed. Brings the
    // approval zone into view and briefly highlights it so a returning user
    // can't miss it.
    try {
      const zone = document.getElementById('feedback-' + p.thread_id);
      const card = zone ? zone.closest('div') : null;
      if (card && card.scrollIntoView) {
        card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
      }
      const banner = document.getElementById('poll-time');
      if (banner) banner.textContent = '⚠ ' + msg + ' — review below';
    } catch (e) { /* DOM not ready; the rendered approval zone still shows */ }

    // Page-title alert — the MOST reliable cross-window signal because it shows
    // in the browser tab strip / window title even when the tab is inactive and
    // requires NO permission (unlike the Notification API). Cleared by
    // clearApprovalTitle() once the pipeline leaves the waiting state.
    try {
      document.title = '🔔 Approval needed — SDLC-V2';
    } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  // Restore the normal page title once nothing is awaiting approval.
  function clearApprovalTitle() {
    try {
      if (document.title !== 'SDLC-V2') document.title = 'SDLC-V2';
    } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  function approvalZone(threadId) {
    return `<div style="margin-top:16px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px">Human Review Required</div>
    <input class="feedback-input" id="feedback-${threadId}" placeholder="Optional feedback or notes...">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px">
      <button class="btn-approve" onclick="approvePipeline('${threadId}', true)">✓ Approve & Continue</button>
      <button class="btn-reject" onclick="approvePipeline('${threadId}', false)">✗ Reject</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  }

  function esc(str) {
    return (str||'').toString().replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
  }

  function selectThread(tid) {
    selectedThread = tid;
    // Sidebar click — different pipeline, so clear cross-pipeline state.
    pollIntervalMs = POLL_BASE_MS;
    pollUnchangedCount = 0;
    lastPipelineSignature = null;
    lastPipelineStatusETag = null;
    renderSidebar();
    renderPipelineBar();
    renderContent();
  }
  function watchPipeline(threadId, requirement) {
    if (!activePipelines[threadId]) {
      activePipelines[threadId] = {
        thread_id: threadId,
        requirement: requirement || '',  // ← USE the requirement we already have
        status: 'STARTED',
        phase: 0
      };
    }
    selectedThread = threadId;
    // User actively switched pipelines — reset backoff AND clear ETag.
    // The ETag belongs to the previous thread's payload; sending it to a
    // different thread's endpoint would either always-200 (wasteful) or
    // worst-case match by coincidence and return a misleading 304.
    pollIntervalMs = POLL_BASE_MS;
    pollUnchangedCount = 0;
    lastPipelineSignature = null;
    lastPipelineStatusETag = null;
    pollActiveOnly();
    scheduleActivePoll(pollIntervalMs);
    renderSidebar();
    renderContent();
  }

  async function discoverActivePipelines() {
    // On page load, ask backend for all known pipelines so they show in sidebar
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`${API}/pipeline/list`, {
        headers: { 'X-API-Key': API_KEY }
      });
      if (!r.ok) return;
      const data = await r.json();
      const pipelines = data.pipelines || data || [];
      for (const p of pipelines) {
        const tid = p.thread_id || p.id;
        if (tid && !activePipelines[tid]) {
          activePipelines[tid] = p;
        }
      }
      if (!selectedThread && pipelines.length) {
        selectedThread = pipelines[0].thread_id || pipelines[0].id;
      }
      renderSidebar();
      renderPipelineBar();
      renderContent();
    } catch(e) {
      console.warn('Pipeline discovery failed:', e);
    }
  }

  function showToast(msg, type='info') {
    const t = document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent = msg;
    t.className = `toast ${type}`;
    t.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(() => { t.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
  }

  // ── Init ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  checkHealth();
  discoverActivePipelines();
  renderContent();
  renderSidebar();

  // Start the three polling loops. Each one re-schedules itself with the
  // current (possibly backed-off) interval after running.
  //
  //   • active pipeline:  starts at 2s, backs off to 30s when nothing changes
  //   • sidebar list:     starts at 10s, backs off to 60s (uses ETag/304)
  //   • health check:     fixed 30s (cheap, not worth backing off)
  //
  // All three auto-pause when the tab is hidden (visibilitychange handler
  // above) and resume with an immediate poll when the user returns.
  scheduleActivePoll(POLL_BASE_MS);
  scheduleSidebarPoll(SIDEBAR_BASE_MS);
  scheduleHealthCheck(HEALTH_INTERVAL_MS);
  // The approval watcher runs independently of the three loops above — it is
  // NOT paused on tab-hide, so an approval that becomes due while the user is
  // on another window still fires a notification.
  scheduleApprovalWatch(APPROVAL_WATCH_MS);
</script>
</body>
</html>


====================================================================================================
FILE: db\stage2_migration.py
====================================================================================================

"""
db/stage2_migration.py  (FINAL — depth-aware units_weights)

Creates Stage 2 tables: asp, artifacts, artifact_decisions, units_weights, pr_registry, audit_log.

KEY CHANGE: units_weights is now (name, depth_level, weight) — composite PK —
so the decide() engine can use depth-aware weighting.

Run once:  python db/stage2_migration.py
Idempotent — safe to re-run.
"""
import os
import psycopg2
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

DDL = """
      -- ── Adaptive Scope Profile ─────────────────────────────────────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asp (
                                         asp_id           UUID PRIMARY KEY,
                                         thread_id        TEXT,
                                         payload          JSONB NOT NULL,
                                         allow_unbounded  BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
                                         policy_mode      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'managed',
                                         depth_level      INT,
                                         created_by       TEXT,
                                         created_at       TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now(),
          version          INT DEFAULT 1
          );
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asp_thread ON asp(thread_id);

-- ── Artifacts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artifacts (
                                               artifact_id    UUID PRIMARY KEY,
                                               asp_id         UUID REFERENCES asp(asp_id),
          thread_id      TEXT,
          type           TEXT NOT NULL,
          category       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mvp',
          payload        JSONB NOT NULL,
          units_estimate INT DEFAULT 0,
          confidence     INT DEFAULT 0,
          status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'candidate',
          created_by     TEXT,
          created_at     TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now()
          );
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_asp ON artifacts(asp_id);
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_thread ON artifacts(thread_id);
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_status ON artifacts(status);

-- ── Artifact decisions ─────────────────────────────────────────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artifact_decisions (
                                                        decision_id   UUID PRIMARY KEY,
                                                        artifact_id   UUID REFERENCES artifacts(artifact_id),
          thread_id     TEXT,
          decision      JSONB NOT NULL,
          decided_by    TEXT,
          decided_at    TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now()
          );
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_decisions_artifact ON artifact_decisions(artifact_id);

-- ── Unit weights — DEPTH-AWARE (name, depth_level, weight) ─────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS units_weights (
                                                   name         TEXT NOT NULL,
                                                   depth_level  INT  NOT NULL,
                                                   weight       FLOAT NOT NULL,
                                                   PRIMARY KEY (name, depth_level)
          );

-- ── Audit log ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (
                                               id          UUID PRIMARY KEY,
                                               thread_id   TEXT,
                                               actor       TEXT,
                                               action      TEXT,
                                               data        JSONB,
                                               created_at  TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now()
          );

-- ── PR registry — idempotent PR creation ───────────────────────────
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pr_registry (
                                                 unique_request_id  TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                                                 artifact_id        UUID,
                                                 thread_id          TEXT,
                                                 repo               TEXT,
                                                 branch             TEXT,
                                                 pr_url             TEXT,
                                                 pr_number          INT,
                                                 status             TEXT DEFAULT 'open',
                                                 created_at         TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT now()
          ); \
      """

# Depth-aware default weights — (name, depth_level): weight
# At LOW depth each unit is heavier (fewer, simpler things expected).
# At HIGH depth each unit is lighter (many units are normal).
DEFAULT_WEIGHTS = {
    "FR":            {1: 2.0, 2: 1.6, 3: 1.2, 4: 1.0, 5: 0.8},
    "NFR":           {1: 1.5, 2: 1.2, 3: 1.0, 4: 0.9, 5: 0.8},
    "CODE_FILE":     {1: 2.0, 2: 1.5, 3: 1.0, 4: 0.8, 5: 0.6},
    "ENDPOINT":      {1: 6.0, 2: 5.0, 3: 4.0, 4: 3.5, 5: 3.0},
    "DB_TABLE":      {1: 14.0, 2: 12.0, 3: 10.0, 4: 9.0, 5: 8.0},
    "MIGRATION":     {1: 10.0, 2: 9.0, 3: 8.0, 4: 7.0, 5: 6.0},
    "INTEGRATION":   {1: 25.0, 2: 22.0, 3: 20.0, 4: 18.0, 5: 16.0},
    "DEPENDENCY":    {1: 5.0, 2: 4.5, 3: 4.0, 4: 3.5, 5: 3.0},
    "TEST_CASE":     {1: 0.8, 2: 0.6, 3: 0.5, 4: 0.4, 5: 0.3},
    "INFRA_SERVICE": {1: 18.0, 2: 16.0, 3: 15.0, 4: 13.0, 5: 12.0},
    "NODE":          {1: 4.0, 2: 3.5, 3: 3.0, 4: 2.5, 5: 2.0},
    "JIRA":          {1: 1.5, 2: 1.3, 3: 1.1, 4: 1.0, 5: 0.9},
    "ADR":           {1: 2.0, 2: 1.8, 3: 1.5, 4: 1.3, 5: 1.2},
    "SPRINT":        {1: 8.0, 2: 7.0, 3: 6.0, 4: 5.5, 5: 5.0},
}


def _conn():
    # Pooled connection — .close() returns it to the pool.
    from core.db_clients import PooledConn
    return PooledConn()


def migrate():
    conn = _conn()
    cur = conn.cursor()
    print("[Migration] Creating Stage 2 tables...")
    cur.execute(DDL)

    print("[Migration] Inserting depth-aware default unit weights...")
    for name, depth_map in DEFAULT_WEIGHTS.items():
        for depth_level, weight in depth_map.items():
            cur.execute(
                """INSERT INTO units_weights (name, depth_level, weight)
                   VALUES (%s, %s, %s)
                       ON CONFLICT (name, depth_level) DO NOTHING""",
                (name, depth_level, weight),
            )

    conn.commit()
    cur.close()
    conn.close()
    print("[Migration] Stage 2 schema ready (depth-aware units_weights).")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    migrate()



====================================================================================================
FILE: debug_export.py
====================================================================================================

import os
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path.cwd()

OUTPUT_FILE = "FULL_DEBUG_EXPORT.txt"

IGNORE_DIRS = {
    ".git",
    "__pycache__",
    ".venv",
    "venv",
    "node_modules",
    ".idea",
    ".mypy_cache",
    ".pytest_cache",
    "dist",
    "build",
    ".next"
}

INCLUDE_EXTENSIONS = {
    ".py",
    ".json",
    ".md",
    ".yaml",
    ".yml",
    ".toml",
    ".env",
    ".txt",
    ".ini",
    ".html",
    ".swp"

}

MAX_FILE_SIZE = 500_000  # 500 KB


def should_skip(path: Path):
    for part in path.parts:
        if part in IGNORE_DIRS:
            return True
    return False


with open(OUTPUT_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as out:

    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")
    out.write("FULL PROJECT DEBUG EXPORT\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n\n")

    # ---------------------------------
    # PROJECT STRUCTURE
    # ---------------------------------

    out.write("\nPROJECT STRUCTURE\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n\n")

    for path in sorted(ROOT.rglob("*")):

        if should_skip(path):
            continue

        try:
            relative = path.relative_to(ROOT)

            depth = len(relative.parts)
            indent = "    " * (depth - 1)

            if path.is_dir():
                out.write(f"{indent}[DIR] {path.name}\n")
            else:
                out.write(f"{indent}{path.name}\n")

        except:
            pass

    # ---------------------------------
    # FILE CONTENTS
    # ---------------------------------

    out.write("\n\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")
    out.write("FILE CONTENTS\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n\n")

    total_files = 0

    for file in sorted(ROOT.rglob("*")):

        if not file.is_file():
            continue

        if should_skip(file):
            continue

        if file.suffix.lower() not in INCLUDE_EXTENSIONS:
            continue

        try:
            size = file.stat().st_size

            if size > MAX_FILE_SIZE:
                out.write("\n")
                out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")
                out.write(f"SKIPPED LARGE FILE: {file.relative_to(ROOT)}\n")
                out.write("=" * 100 + "\n\n")
                continue

            relative = file.relative_to(ROOT)

            out.write("\n")
            out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")
            out.write(f"FILE: {relative}\n")
            out.write("=" * 100 + "\n\n")

            content = file.read_text(
                encoding="utf-8",
                errors="ignore"
            )

            out.write(content)
            out.write("\n\n")

            total_files += 1

        except Exception as e:
            out.write(f"\nERROR READING {file}: {e}\n")

    out.write("\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")
    out.write(f"TOTAL FILES EXPORTED: {total_files}\n")
    out.write("=" * 100 + "\n")

print(f"\nDONE -> {OUTPUT_FILE}")

services:

  qdrant:
    image: qdrant/qdrant:latest
    container_name: sdlc_qdrant
    ports:
      - "6333:6333"
      - "6334:6334"
    volumes:
      - qdrant_data:/qdrant/storage
    restart: unless-stopped

  neo4j:
    image: neo4j:5.18
    container_name: sdlc_neo4j
    hostname: sdlc_neo4j
    ports:
      - "7474:7474"
      - "7687:7687"
    environment:
      - NEO4J_AUTH=neo4j/${NEO4J_PASSWORD}
      - NEO4J_PLUGINS=["apoc"]
      - NEO4J_dbms_security_procedures_unrestricted=apoc.*
      - NEO4J_dbms_default__listen__address=0.0.0.0
    volumes:
      - neo4j_data:/data
      - neo4j_logs:/logs
    restart: unless-stopped

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    container_name: sdlc_postgres
    ports:
      - "5437:5432"
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=sdlc
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=sdlc_knowledge
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped


  sdlc_api:
    build: .
    container_name: sdlc_api
    ports:
      - "8001:8001"
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      POSTGRES_HOST: sdlc_postgres
      POSTGRES_PORT: 5432
      QDRANT_HOST: sdlc_qdrant
      QDRANT_PORT: 6333
      NEO4J_URI: bolt://sdlc_neo4j:7687
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - qdrant
      - neo4j
    volumes:
      - ./repos:/repos
      # Mount the HOST's Docker daemon socket so Phase 7 can run `docker build`
      # / `docker push` using the host's Docker engine. This is what lets a
      # containerized app build images without running a daemon inside itself
      # (which an unprivileged container can't do). The `docker` CLI inside this
      # container talks to the host daemon over this socket.
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  qdrant_data:
  neo4j_data:
  neo4j_logs:
  postgres_data:
